item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3min FWIW you have to fancy the winners of the PSG v Bayern semi-final to win the trophy.
item.description: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3min FWIW you have to fancy the winners of the PSG v Bayern semi-final to win the trophy. Anything can happen in a final, we know that, but the knockout draw has been so lopsided this season. I'll be surprised if Atletico or Arsenal win it. 69

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 5min Ali Carter, Fan Zhengyi, He Guoqiang, Lei Peifan, Liam Highfield, Jak Jones, Gary Wi
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 5min Ali Carter, Fan Zhengyi, He Guoqiang, Lei Peifan, Liam Highfield, Jak Jones, Gary Wilson and Zhang Anda have qualified for the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible.
Scores and news from @snookerorg and @WeAreWST .
#Snooker 1 2 74

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 8min European Cup semi-finals:
Atletico Madrid v Arsenal Paris Saint-Germain v Bayern Mu
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 8min European Cup semi-finals:
Atletico Madrid v Arsenal Paris Saint-Germain v Bayern Munich
Who do you think will be lifting Big Ears in Budapest on May 30th? Arsenal Atletico Madrid Bayern Munich Paris Saint-Germain 8 votos · 23 horas restantes 150

item.title: nytimes: Nick Metcalfe reposteó The New York Times @nytimes · 1h From @TheAthletic : The future of LIV Golf is in question as th
item.description: Nick Metcalfe reposteó The New York Times @nytimes · 1h From @TheAthletic : The future of LIV Golf is in question as the Saudi Arabian sovereign wealth fund that financed the rebel league is preparing to pull its multibillion-dollar investment. De nytimes.com 19 27 80 45 mil

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 16min European Cup classic in Munich and Bayern Munich are through to the semi-finals.
I
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 16min European Cup classic in Munich and Bayern Munich are through to the semi-finals.
It finishes Bayern 4 Real Madrid 3 tonight. Bayern win 6-4 on aggregate. 2 1 240

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 18min Arsenal are through to the semi-finals of the European Cup.
Arsenal draw 0-0 with
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 18min Arsenal are through to the semi-finals of the European Cup.
Arsenal draw 0-0 with Sporting tonight, winning 1-0 on aggregate. 227

item.title: EPSBofficial: Matt reposteó English Partnership for Snooker and Billiards @EPSBofficial · 14 abr. BACK TO BACK Last weekend, Shaun Li
item.description: Matt reposteó English Partnership for Snooker and Billiards @EPSBofficial · 14 abr. BACK TO BACK Last weekend, Shaun Liu became just the third player ever to defend the English Under-16 Championship title - following in the footsteps of Sam Craigie and Paul Deaville! A young player with a bright future in our sport #EnglishSnooker http:// dlvr.it/TS1vqZ 1 7 412
